'''hojangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equicellular|equicellular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equicellular|equicellular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hojangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hojangithi|hojangithi]] || [[word:hojangiji|hojangiji]] || [[word:hojangishi|hojangishi]] || [[word:hojangiki|hojangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hojanguthuthu|hojanguthuthu]] || [[word:hojangujuju|hojangujuju]] || [[word:hojangushushu|hojangushushu]] || [[word:hojangukuku|hojangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hojanguthu|hojanguthu]] || [[word:hojanguju|hojanguju]] || [[word:hojangushu|hojangushu]] || [[word:hojanguku|hojanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hojangufthuf|hojangufthuf]] || [[word:hojangufjuf|hojangufjuf]] || [[word:hojangufshuf|hojangufshuf]] || [[word:hojangufkuf|hojangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hojangethe|hojangethe]] || [[word:hojangeje|hojangeje]] || [[word:hojangeshe|hojangeshe]] || [[word:hojangeke|hojangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hojangothotho|hojangothotho]] || [[word:hojangojojo|hojangojojo]] || [[word:hojangoshosho|hojangoshosho]] || [[word:hojangokoko|hojangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hojangotho|hojangotho]] || [[word:hojangojo|hojangojo]] || [[word:hojangosho|hojangosho]] || [[word:hojangoko|hojangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hojangofthof|hojangofthof]] || [[word:hojangofjof|hojangofjof]] || [[word:hojangofshof|hojangofshof]] || [[word:hojangofkof|hojangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfthĂŻf|hojangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfjĂŻf|hojangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfshĂŻf|hojangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfkĂŻf|hojangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|hojangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|hojangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|hojangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|hojangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfthĂŻf|hojangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfjĂŻf|hojangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfshĂŻf|hojangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfkĂŻf|hojangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfthĂŻf|hojangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfjĂŻf|hojangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfshĂŻf|hojangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hojangĂŻfkĂŻf|hojangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hojangĂŠthĂŠ|hojangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hojangĂŠjĂŠ|hojangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hojangĂŠshĂŠ|hojangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hojangĂŠkĂŠ|hojangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hojangathatha|hojangathatha]] || [[word:hojangajaja|hojangajaja]] || [[word:hojangashasha|hojangashasha]] || [[word:hojangakaka|hojangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hojangatha|hojangatha]] || [[word:hojangaja|hojangaja]] || [[word:hojangasha|hojangasha]] || [[word:hojangaka|hojangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hojangafthaf|hojangafthaf]] || [[word:hojangafjaf|hojangafjaf]] || [[word:hojangafshaf|hojangafshaf]] || [[word:hojangafkaf|hojangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hojangasha|hojangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hojangshĂ«asha|hojangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hojangroasha|hojangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hojangmuasha|hojangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hojangyaasha|hojangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohojangnkshĂ«asha|gohojangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohojangnkroasha|gohojangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohojangnkmuasha|gohojangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohojangnkyaasha|gohojangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hojajangasha|hojajangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hojajangshĂ«asha|hojajangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hojajangroasha|hojajangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hojajangmuasha|hojajangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hojajangyaasha|hojajangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohojajangnkshĂ«asha|gohojajangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohojajangnkroasha|gohojajangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohojajangnkmuasha|gohojajangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohojajangnkyaasha|gohojajangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hejĂŠngasha|hejĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hejĂŠngshĂ«asha|hejĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hejĂŠngroasha|hejĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hejĂŠngmuasha|hejĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hejĂŠngyaasha|hejĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohejĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gohejĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohejĂŠngnkroasha|gohejĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohejĂŠngnkmuasha|gohejĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohejĂŠngnkyaasha|gohejĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hojfangasha|hojfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hojfangshĂ«asha|hojfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hojfangroasha|hojfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hojfangmuasha|hojfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hojfangyaasha|hojfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohojfangnkshĂ«asha|gohojfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohojfangnkroasha|gohojfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohojfangnkmuasha|gohojfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohojfangnkyaasha|gohojfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
